audience: SME owners and teams considering AI for document processing, internal knowledge, intake, classification or guided automation
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Bedrijven uitleggen hoe ze een concrete en controleerbare AI-applicatie laten ontwikkelen rond eigen kennis en processen

searchIntent.question: How can a business commission a reliable AI application built around its own data and workflow?
searchIntent.geographicContext: English-speaking SMEs and operational teams in Belgium

directAnswer: A reliable AI application starts with one bounded task, approved source data and measurable quality criteria. Test it on real examples, keep human approval where errors carry consequences, and integrate access control, privacy, logging and fallback behaviour before expanding automation.
title: Building an AI application: from use case and data to a reliable workflow
metaDescription: Planning an AI application? Turn a clear use case, source data, tests, human review, privacy, logging and integrations into a reliable business workflow.
h1: Building an AI application: from use case and data to a reliable workflow

internalLinks.anchor: complete guide to building an app

factsToPreserve: The value comes from the combination of data, instructions, interface, permissions, testing and human control, not the model alone
Many applications can retrieve approved document passages instead of training a completely proprietary model
Financial, legal, medical and customer-sensitive decisions may still require human approval
An AI layer must not bypass existing access permissions
Privacy affects architecture, supplier choice and interface design
A prototype should use real examples before full production integration
